description: Create the TaskPanel.jsx component with complete task management UI including sections (Today/Upcoming/No Due Date/Completed), task creation form, task editing, filtering, manual ordering (Move Up/Move Down), and location pin integration
steps: Create src/TaskPanel.jsx as a new component file following the pattern of src/PinPanel.jsx and src/ReminderPanel.jsx
Define task data structure: { id, title, notes, status, priority, dueDate, createdAt, locationPinId, sortOrder }
Implement panel layout with header (icon + title + count + close button), search bar (optional), filter buttons (All/Todo/In Progress/Waiting/Completed)

Implement collapsible sections: Today (tasks with dueDate = today, default expanded), Upcoming (tasks with future dueDate, default expanded), No Due Date (tasks without dueDate, default expanded), Completed (completed tasks, default collapsed)

Each task row displays: checkbox/status indicator, title, priority badge (colored: high=red, medium=amber, low=slate), due date if exists, location indicator (pin icon) if locationPinId is set. Keep rows compact for scanning dozens of tasks.

Implement 'New Task' button that opens a minimal inline form: Title (required input), Notes (optional textarea), Priority (select: Low/Medium/High, default Medium), Due Date (optional date input), Create button. No advanced options.

Implement task detail/edit view: clicking a task opens an edit form allowing changes to Title, Notes, Status (dropdown), Priority, Due Date. Include a 'Set Task Location' button and a 'Go To Location' button (if locationPinId exists).

Implement 'Set Task Location' workflow: when clicked, call a prop function (onStartLocationSelection) that passes the task ID to App.jsx. The panel should show a message like 'Click on canvas to set location...' with a cancel button. App.jsx will handle the actual canvas click and pin creation.
Implement 'Go To Location' button: calls prop onNavigateToLocation(locationPinId) which navigates the viewport to the linked pin.

Implement manual ordering: each task row has Move Up / Move Down buttons (use ChevronUp/ChevronDown icons from lucide-react) visible on hover. Moving updates the sortOrder field. The ordering is preserved within each section.
Implement task deletion with a delete button in the edit view.

Use Tailwind CSS classes matching the existing design language (slate backgrounds, rounded-lg, text-xs/text-sm fonts, hover transitions). Use lucide-react icons: CheckSquare or ListTodo for panel icon, ChevronUp/ChevronDown for reorder, MapPin for location, X for close, Plus for new task, Search for filter.

Export the component as default export. Accept these props: tasks (array), showPanel (boolean), onClose (function), onAddTask (function), onUpdateTask (function), onDeleteTask (function), onReorderTask (function taking taskId and direction 'up'|'down'), onStartLocationSelection (function taking taskId), onNavigateToLocation (function taking pinId), onCancelLocationSelection (function), isSelectingLocation (boolean), selectingLocationForTaskId (string|null).
Performance: use React.memo or useMemo for section grouping/filtering to ensure responsiveness with 100-200 tasks.
acceptance_criteria: TaskPanel.jsx exists in src/ and exports a default React component
Panel displays tasks grouped in 4 collapsible sections: Today, Upcoming, No Due Date, Completed
New task form collects title (required), notes, priority, due date
Edit view allows changing title, notes, status, priority, due date
Move Up/Move Down controls change task order within sections
Set Task Location button triggers location selection mode
Go To Location button visible when task has locationPinId
Visual design matches existing panel aesthetics (PinPanel/ReminderPanel)
`npm run build` passes with no errors after adding the file
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it exits with code 0
findings: TaskPanel.jsx created (322 lines). Build passes cleanly. Component exports default function, accepts all specified props, uses useMemo for section grouping/filtering. Sections: Today, Upcoming, No Due Date, Completed. Includes inline new task form, edit view with location buttons, status toggle on click, priority badges, reorder buttons on hover. Uses indigo-600 as accent color (matching ReminderPanel pattern).
